function.name: book_meeting
function.description: Book a consultation meeting with the Direct Eight team. Use when the prospect agrees to a meeting. Checks calendar availability and creates a booking with a Zoom link.

prospect_email.description: Email address of the prospect (if provided)

preferred_date.description: Preferred date for the meeting in YYYY-MM-DD format

preferred_time.description: Preferred time for the meeting in HH:MM format (24hr, AEST)

notes.description: Any relevant notes about the prospect's needs or pain points discovered during the call

messages.content: Let me check what's available for you.
Perfect, you're all booked in. You'll receive a calendar invite shortly with the Zoom link.
I'm having a little trouble with the calendar right now. Let me make sure someone from the team follows up with you to get that locked in.

function.name: transfer_call
function.description: Transfer the call live to the Direct Eight sales team. Use when the prospect is very interested and wants to speak to someone immediately.

destinations.message: Hi, I have a prospect on the line who's interested in Direct Eight's commercial cleaning services. Transferring now.
destinations.description: Direct Eight team — hot lead transfer

messages.content: Let me connect you with the team right now — one moment.
It looks like the team's currently unavailable. Let me make sure someone calls you back shortly instead.

function.name: log_callback
function.description: Log a callback request and notify the Direct Eight team via email. Use when the prospect wants a human to call them back rather than booking a meeting or being transferred.

prospect_phone.description: Phone number to call back on

preferred_callback_time.description: When the prospect wants to be called back (e.g., 'tomorrow morning', 'after 2pm')

reason.description: Brief context on what the prospect is interested in

messages.content: Let me make a note of that for you.
Done — someone from the Direct Eight team will give you a call shortly.
I've noted your details. The team will be in touch soon.

function.name: end_call
function.description: End the call gracefully. Use after completing the closing step, after the prospect requests removal from the list, or after handling abusive behaviour.

messages.content: Thanks so much for your time. Have a great day!
